description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named job1 that runs in this stage. In job1 execute the following script commands in order: docker build -f ./Dockerfile.ubuntu -t taisun/vdi_ubuntu:$CI_BUILD_REF ., docker build -f ./Dockerfile.debian -t taisun/vdi_debian:$CI_BUILD_REF ., docker tag taisun/vdi_debian:$CI_BUILD_REF taisun/vdi_debian:latest, docker tag taisun/vdi_ubuntu:$CI_BUILD_REF taisun/vdi_ubuntu:latest, echo $DOCKERPASS | docker login -u taisun --password-stdin, docker push taisun/vdi_ubuntu:$CI_BUILD_REF, docker push taisun/vdi_debian:$CI_BUILD_REF, docker push taisun/vdi_ubuntu:latest, docker push taisun/vdi_debian:latest. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
